creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #3)

Thanks for reminding me.
In review D27863 there is following comment from mat@.

"What happens if there is a port with: USES= ruby gem"

And I got stagnant while thinking how it should be handled. 
But it is detected as developer's error at check-sanity phase.
I'll also update the review soon.
